error: usage of an `unsafe` block
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/add_op_c9/sample_001/target.rs:6:20

6 |     let one_past = unsafe { &a[4] }; // one past the end of the array
  |                    ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/add_op_c9/sample_001/target.rs:1:14
  |
1 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |
  = help: consider using `()`, or a `Result`

warning: unnecessary `unsafe` block
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/add_op_c9/sample_001/target.rs:6:20
  |
6 |     let one_past = unsafe { &a[4] }; // one past the end of the array
  |                    ^^^^^^ unnecessary `unsafe` block
  |
  = note: `#[warn(unused_unsafe)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

error: this operation will panic at runtime
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/add_op_c9/sample_001/target.rs:6:30
  |
6 |     let one_past = unsafe { &a[4] }; // one past the end of the array
  |                              ^^^^ index out of bounds: the length is 4 but the index is 4
  |
  = note: `#[deny(unconditional_panic)]` on by default
